head_commit.message:
Task/design internal dtos (#14)

* Model an Extractor to convert JSON into DTOs

* Confirm Validation working via Test for Extractor

* Model properties as Enum

* Improve modelling of the Webhook Properties with the Enum in the Field Map

* Refactor where possible

* Adjust test suite to pass after refactor

* Todos for later

* Confirm that invalid properties yield a 500 status

* Better name the badProperties class and add a javadoc

* Ensure that codebase throws more specific form of ApplicationException

* All logs to be defined in WebhookLogger

* Review todos and refactor where possible

* Place JSON payloads in dedicated directory

* Use RequestHeader outright to get CaseSensitive header

* Fix application properties for push events
